description: Product Description RE-GEN Cotton Wool Balls Key features and specifications... RE-GEN convenient and versatile cotton wool balls are perfect for a variety of uses, from makeup removal and skincare routines to cleaning delicate areas and applying medical care. They are made from 100% pure cotton, ensuring a smooth and gentle touch. Designed to quickly and effectively absorb liquids, our cotton wool balls are perfect for applying lotions, creams, and cleaning agents for a number of different tasks. Whether you need them for makeup removal, skincare routines, personal care, or first aid, RE-GEN cotton wool balls are the ideal choice. Their versatility makes them a must-have in every household. Made from 100% pure cotton wool, ensuring they are gentle on even the most sensitive skin. All RE-GEN cotton wool products are free from impurities, providing a safe and reliable option for all your skincare needs. At RE-GEN, we pride ourselves on providing premium cotton wool products that are essential for healthcare, beauty, and daily hygiene. Our commitment to quality and excellence ensures that every item in our range meets the highest standards of softness, absorbency, and purity.
